summary: Read-only R5 behavior gates and safety review of the revised unfinished-improvement plan. Inspected AGENTS.md, the revised review document, relevant gate/audit/behavior/safety code, and memory/user-intent notes. No product files were modified.
decisions: The revised document is adequate as a completion plan from the behavior gates/safety lens because it requires verify:goal parity, verify:v2, behavior recall trigger coverage, public-data sync policy, raw transcript/secret blocking, memory-audit visibility, and hard-gated recovery/sync proof.
Current implementation may still need work, but this review judges the exact revised document as a work contract rather than a completion claim.
next_steps: Record R5 as AGREE for this revised document.
Continue remaining reviewers and rerun any reviewer that returns REVISE_REQUIRED against the next revision.
